ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the data corresponds to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset at the given time */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset at the given time */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the time interval */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the time interval */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded during the time interval */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock, commodity) */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour, 1 day) for which the market data is collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the asset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was created in the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the asset belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the asset belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "market_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market is open during the session */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the trading session takes place */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset accessed by the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source if applicable */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check performed */,
  "check_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the template covers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "template_category" TEXT /* Category of the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generated_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generated report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template used to generate the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the generated report is stored */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generated_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generated_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)
